productDisplayName: Nike Men's Arsenal Core Yellow T-shirt
description: CompositionBright yellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline and graphic print on the chestFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Flaunt the soccer spirit of the Arsenals in style with this bright yellow cotton t-shirt from nike. Part of the nike Better World campaign, which is dedicated to serving the athlete and making a better world through sport, this tee is a great way to reminisce the canonic spirit of this soccer team. Pair it with jeans and sports shoes, or shorts and floaters for unparalleled sporty cool.
